team_name: TenderEval AI — AI-Powered Tender Evaluation for Government Procurement
summary: Design a technical platform that can understand tenders, evaluate bidder eligibility, and produce explainable evaluation reports for government procurement.
optimization_claims: Automates the evaluation process, saving weeks per tender.
Provides explainable reasoning for each eligibility verdict.
constraints_addressed: Handling various document formats (PDF, Word, scanned copies, photos)
Addressing ambiguous cases with explicit Needs Review
